TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Danny Arnold == kawas tay 1925, ryax sa tay 23 nqu tay 1, Danny Arnold, squliq na Bunge'. (wal mhuqil sa kawas tay 1995) sraral qyanux nya Danny Arnold htgan ryax nya ga New York City, taring mtzyaw la, trang 'bagan lga mtzyaw hmyapas. the sazing cinbwanan mciriq, mhetay beh United States Marine Corps qasa. suruw lga musa maki Hollywood la. Arnold sazing kekong nha ru maki sazing laqi nya. 1955 kawas hiya te qutux kekong Ray, Gilbert na kneril laqi kekong. te sazing tmasoq qnxan. Arnold te sazing bes nya , trang hiya praw 作家 makiTennessee, Ernie . hiya ga pisbay squilq ru myuzing squilq mhtuw maki telibi. Arnold ru te sazing bes nya,maki 1961 kawas kekong,maki sazing laqi uzi David ru Dannel. 1995 kawas 8 byacing 15 ryax,maki ngasal wal mhuilq(70 kawas) bincyogun nya cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: == *annj arnol* == kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, *annj arnol*, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. (wal mħuqil s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) s~ɕraral qjanux nja *annj arnol* ħtɣan rjax nja ɣa new jork ʦ~ʨitj, tariŋ mtzjaw la, traŋ ʔβaɣan lɣa mtzjaw ħmjapas~ɕ. tħe s~ɕaziŋ ʦ~ʨinβwanan mʦ~ʨiriq, mħetaj βeħ unite* s~ɕtates~ɕ marine ʦ~ʨorps~ɕ qas~ɕa. s~ɕuruw lɣa mus~ɕa maki ħolljwoo* la. arnol* s~ɕaziŋ kekoŋ nħa ru maki s~ɕaziŋ laqi nja. **** kawas~ɕ ħija te qutux kekoŋ raj, ɣilβert na kneril laqi kekoŋ. te s~ɕaziŋ tmas~ɕoq qnxan. arnol* te s~ɕaziŋ βes~ɕ nja , traŋ ħija praw ** makitennes~ɕs~ɕee, ernie . ħija ɣa pis~ɕβaj s~ɕquilq ru mjuziŋ s~ɕquilq mħtuw maki teliβi. arnol* ru te s~ɕaziŋ βes~ɕ nja,maki **** kawas~ɕ kekoŋ,maki s~ɕaziŋ laqi uzi *a*i* ru *annel. **** kawas~ɕ * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ** rjax,maki ŋas~ɕal wal mħuilq(** kawas~ɕ) βinʦ~ʨjoɣun nja ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
S.FORM: == Danny Arnold == kawas tay 1925, ryax sa tay 23 nqu tay 1, Danny Arnold, squliq na Bunge'. (wal mhuqil sa kawas tay 1995) sraral qyanux nya Danny Arnold htgan ryax nya ga New York City, taring mtzyaw la, trang 'bagan lga mtzyaw hmyapas. the sazing cinbwanan mciriq, mhetay beh United States Marine Corps qasa. suruw lga musa maki Hollywood la. Arnold sazing kekong nha ru maki sazing laqi nya. 1955 kawas hiya te qutux kekong Ray, Gilbert na kneril laqi kekong. te sazing tmasoq qnxan. Arnold te sazing bes nya , trang hiya praw 作家 makiTennessee, Ernie . hiya ga pisbay squilq ru myuzing squilq mhtuw maki telibi. Arnold ru te sazing bes nya,maki 1961 kawas kekong,maki sazing laqi uzi David ru Dannel. 1995 kawas 8 byacing 15 ryax,maki ngasal wal mhuilq(70 kawas) bincyogun nya cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: == *annj arnol* == kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, *annj arnol*, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. (wal mħuqil s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) s~ɕraral qjanux nja *annj arnol* ħtɣan rjax nja ɣa new jork ʦ~ʨitj, tariŋ mtzjaw la, traŋ ʔβaɣan lɣa mtzjaw ħmjapas~ɕ. tħe s~ɕaziŋ ʦ~ʨinβwanan mʦ~ʨiriq, mħetaj βeħ unite* s~ɕtates~ɕ marine ʦ~ʨorps~ɕ qas~ɕa. s~ɕuruw lɣa mus~ɕa maki ħolljwoo* la. arnol* s~ɕaziŋ kekoŋ nħa ru maki s~ɕaziŋ laqi nja. **** kawas~ɕ ħija te qutux kekoŋ raj, ɣilβert na kneril laqi kekoŋ. te s~ɕaziŋ tmas~ɕoq qnxan. arnol* te s~ɕaziŋ βes~ɕ nja , traŋ ħija praw ** makitennes~ɕs~ɕee, ernie . ħija ɣa pis~ɕβaj s~ɕquilq ru mjuziŋ s~ɕquilq mħtuw maki teliβi. arnol* ru te s~ɕaziŋ βes~ɕ nja,maki **** kawas~ɕ kekoŋ,maki s~ɕaziŋ laqi uzi *a*i* ru *annel. **** kawas~ɕ * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ** rjax,maki ŋas~ɕal wal mħuilq(** kawas~ɕ) βinʦ~ʨjoɣun nja ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
